statements.sql: select * from `mpx_custom_field_group_type_values` inner join `mpx_custom_field_group_type_class_template` on `mpx_custom_field_group_type_class_template`.`cf_gt_class_template_id` = `mpx_custom_field_group_type_values`.`cf_gt_class_template_id` inner join `mpx_custom_field_group_type` on `mpx_custom_field_group_type_class_template`.`cf_group_type_id` = `mpx_custom_field_group_type`.`cf_group_type_id` where (`mpx_custom_field_group_type_values`.`data_id` = 1 and `mpx_custom_field_group_type_class_template`.`class_id` = 7 and `mpx_custom_field_group_type_class_template`.`template_id` = 1) and `mpx_custom_field_group_type`.`field_for` in ('a', 'w', 'ap') order by `c_order` asc
select * from `mpx_banner` where `bnr_group` = 'home-banner' and `status` = 1 order by `c_order` desc
select `fm_id`, `name`, `slug`, `designation`, `company_name`, `synopsis`, `media_id` from `mpx_fund_man` where `status` = 1 order by `fm_id` desc
select `tmnl_id`, `name`, `descp`, `company`, `designation`, `media_id` from `mpx_testimonial` where `status` = 1 order by `tmnl_id` desc
select `title`, `slug`, `template_id` from `mpx_pages` where `page_id` in (21, 22, 23, 24, 25) and `status` = 1 order by `c_order` asc
select * from `mpx_blog` where `status` = 1 and `mpx_blog`.`deleted_at` is null order by `updated_at` desc limit 3
select count(*) as aggregate from `mpx_news` where `status` = 1
select `title`, `slug`, `media_type`, `image`, `video_from`, `video_data`, `video_image`, `news_source_link` from `mpx_news` where `status` = 1 order by `n_id` desc limit 3 offset 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `mpx_ask_expert_question` where `status` = 1
select * from `mpx_ask_expert_question` where `status` = 1 order by `created_at` desc limit 1 offset 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `mpx_nfo_offer` where DATE_FORMAT(fund_closing, "%Y") =2024
select `no_id`, `fund_name`, `objective`, `post_date`, `media_id` from `mpx_nfo_offer` where DATE_FORMAT(fund_closing, "%Y") =2024 order by `fund_closing` desc limit 5 offset 0
select count(*) as aggregate from `mpx_faq` where `cc_id` = 1 and `status` = 1
select `title`, `descp`, `faq_id` from `mpx_faq` where `cc_id` = 1 and `status` = 1 order by `c_order` asc limit 3 offset 0
